examples: Orion had the habit of staring motionlessly at his interlocutor.
They are motivated to find ingenious ways to persuade their interlocutor.
At first smile and maintain visual contact with the interlocutor.
He was a more palatable interlocutor for the West than Mr Putin had been.
And as I pointed out to the Foreign Minister, he is going to have an interlocutor in John Kerry.
